kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back! Let's keep your window cleaning business crystal clear. Ready to manage your routes and book more jobs?

quickActions.label: Schedule a cleaning
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule a new window cleaning job for a client.

quickActions.label: Send an estimate
quickActions.prompt: Help me create and send an estimate for window cleaning.

quickActions.label: Follow up on leads
quickActions.prompt: Show me my recent leads that need follow-up.

quickActions.label: Check today's jobs
quickActions.prompt: What window cleaning jobs are scheduled for today?

quickActions.label: Request a review
quickActions.prompt: Help me send a review request to a recent client.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a window cleaning business. You help manage residential and commercial window cleaning schedules, coordinate crews, handle estimates based on window count and building size, and grow the business through reputation management and advertising.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}! We make windows sparkle inside and out. Are you looking for a window cleaning quote or want to schedule a service?
commonReasons: Get a quote for window cleaning
Ask about interior and exterior cleaning

steps.title: Name your window cleaning business
steps.body: Enter the name clients will see when you send estimates and invoices.

steps.title: Set your service area
steps.body: Define the neighborhoods or zip codes where your crews operate.

steps.title: Add your window services
steps.body: List the services you offer: interior, exterior, screens, tracks, skylights, storm windows, etc.

steps.title: Set your pricing
steps.body: Configure pricing per pane, per window, or by home/building size.

steps.title: Add your crew
steps.body: Add team members so you can assign routes and schedule jobs efficiently.

steps.title: Go live!
steps.body: Your window cleaning business is set up. Start capturing leads and booking jobs!

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a window cleaning business.
capabilities: Schedule and manage window cleaning jobs
Create estimates based on window count and building type
Coordinate crew assignments and daily routes
Track recurring cleaning schedules for repeat clients
Send automated appointment reminders to clients
Monitor online reviews and respond to feedback
Analyze revenue by property type and service level
